AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 185 

SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_2_CD 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity 2: Number Minutes of Moderate Exercise 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity counting 
number of minutes of moderate exercise. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_2_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = 0 minutes 
10
